query:
-- Fix the 3 inverted games: HOU@CIN (id=2250567), CHC@TEX (id=2250571), ATL@LAD (id=2250574)
-- awayBookSpread is the authoritative sign — awayModelSpread must match
UPDATE games
SET
  awayModelSpread = CASE
    WHEN awayBookSpread >= 0 AND awayModelSpread < 0 THEN ABS(awayModelSpread)
    WHEN awayBookSpread < 0  AND awayModelSpread > 0 THEN -ABS(awayModelSpread)
    ELSE awayModelSpread
  END,
  homeModelSpread = CASE
    WHEN awayBookSpread >= 0 AND awayModelSpread < 0 THEN -ABS(awayModelSpread)
    WHEN awayBookSpread < 0  AND awayModelSpread > 0 THEN ABS(awayModelSpread)
    ELSE homeModelSpread
  END
WHERE id IN (2250567, 2250571, 2250574)
  AND awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND SIGN(awayBookSpread) != SIGN(awayModelSpread);

-- Verify the fix
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, awayModelSpread, homeBookSpread, homeModelSpread,
  CASE WHEN SIGN(awayBookSpread) = SIGN(awayModelSpread) THEN 'OK' ELSE 'INVERTED' END AS rl_status
FROM games
WHERE id IN (2250567, 2250571, 2250574);
